name: mcp-server-trello
description: Trello boards integration for Claude — manage cards, lists, checklists, labels, members, and more via MCP
long_description:
A comprehensive MCP server for Trello that provides 47 tools for managing your Trello boards directly from Claude.

- **Cards**: Create, update, move, archive cards with full detail support
- **Lists & Boards**: Manage lists, boards, and workspaces
- **Checklists**: Create and manage checklists and checklist items
- **Comments**: Add, update, and delete card comments
- **Attachments**: Attach images and files from URLs or base64 data
- **Members & Labels**: Manage board members and labels
- **Health Monitoring**: Built-in health checks and diagnostics

tools.name: get_cards_by_list_id
tools.description: Fetch cards from a specific Trello list

tools.name: get_lists
tools.description: Get all lists from a board

tools.name: add_card_to_list
tools.description: Create a new card in a list

tools.name: add_list_to_board
tools.description: Create a new list on a board

tools.name: get_my_cards
tools.description: Get cards assigned to the current user

tools.name: attach_image_to_card
tools.description: Attach an image from URL to a card

tools.name: attach_file_to_card
tools.description: Attach a file from URL or local path to a card

tools.name: attach_image_data_to_card
tools.description: Attach a base64/data URL image to a card

tools.name: set_active_board
tools.description: Set the default board for operations

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a card

tools.name: delete_comment
tools.description: Delete a comment from a card

tools.name: get_card_comments
tools.description: Get all comments on a card

tools.name: create_checklist
tools.description: Create a new checklist on a card

tools.name: add_checklist_item
tools.description: Add an item to a checklist

tools.name: get_checklist_by_name
tools.description: Get a checklist by name with completion percentage

tools.name: assign_member_to_card
tools.description: Assign a member to a card

tools.name: remove_member_from_card
tools.description: Remove a member from a card

tools.name: get_board_labels
tools.description: Get all labels on a board

api_key.title: Trello API Key
api_key.description: Your Trello API key from https://trello.com/power-ups/admin

board_id.title: Default Board ID
board_id.description: Optional default board ID (can be set later via set_active_board tool)
